query: Which publishers have fill rates below 50% and what's their health status?

publisher_health.alert: Fill rate 42% — below threshold. Revenue down 18% MoM.
Fill rate recovering from 31% low last week.
Integration issue detected — JS tag returning 500 errors on mobile.

response.summary: 3 publishers with fill rate below 50%. 2 CRITICAL (immediate action required), 1 WARNING. Estimated daily revenue impact: $4,200.
recommendations: LifestyleHub: escalate to integration team — JS tag errors on mobile causing fill rate drop
TechMedia Group: review floor price settings — possible overbidding suppression
SportsBlog Network: monitor daily — trending positive, no action needed
